steps.title: Define variables in terms of mass B
steps.content:
Let mass of A = 5.04B (since 504% = 5.04).
Let mass of A = 0.00072C (since 0.072% = 0.00072).
Equate the two expressions for A: $$5.04B = 0.00072C$$

steps.title: Solve for C in terms of B
steps.content:
Substitute into equation: $$5.04B = 0.00072C \Rightarrow C = \frac{5.04}{0.00072}B$$
Simplify the division: $$\frac{5.04}{0.00072} = 7000$$
Thus: $$C = 7000B$$

steps.title: Convert to percentage and divide by 1000
steps.content:
Since C = 7000B, mass C is 700000% of mass B (p = 700000%).
Calculate $\frac{p}{1000}$: $$\frac{700000}{1000} = 700$$
The answer is 700.
